title: Platinum Collection audio issue
wikitext:
[]: Platinum Collection audio issue             Quote Post by Eva Unit XX » Mon Aug 13, 2012 4:40 pm Hi guys, first topic ever here. I really love your site. Anyways, I started to re-watch my Platinum collection today and I realized that the volume of the dialogue was very low in some scenes. For example, when Shinji gives Misato his ID paper thing in episode 1 she says "then read this" in Japanese. This line comes out in very low volume compared to the rest of the dialogue as if Misato was speaking from a very distant location. This only occurs with the Japanese audio. The English one is flawless. I noticed other scenes with the same problem and was wondering if this is normal or if something is wrong with my settings. Thanks in advance for any replies.

[]: Re: Platinum Collection audio issue             Quote Post by PolarisX » Mon Aug 13, 2012 7:04 pm Eva Unit XX wrote: Hi guys, first topic ever here. I really love your site. Anyways, I started to re-watch my Platinum collection today and I realized that the volume of the dialogue was very low in some scenes. For example, when Shinji gives Misato his ID paper thing in episode 1 she says "then read this" in Japanese. This line comes out in very low volume compared to the rest of the dialogue as if Misato was speaking from a very distant location. This only occurs with the Japanese audio. The English one is flawless. I noticed other scenes with the same problem and was wondering if this is normal or if something is wrong with my settings. Thanks in advance for any replies.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Unit XX » Mon Aug 13, 2012 8:17 pm I'm watching it on my ps3. It's funny how I watched it on my ps3 many times before and never noticed the lower volume in those scenes. I really should get a surround system huh? Thanks for the reply

[]:             Quote Post by PolarisX » Sat Aug 18, 2012 12:13 am Eva Unit XX wrote: I'm watching it on my ps3. It's funny how I watched it on my ps3 many times before and never noticed the lower volume in those scenes. I really should get a surround system huh? Thanks for the reply
